56.title: Ticket schema
56.snippet: A ticket is a Markdown file whose YAML frontmatter (between --- delimiters) follows this contract. junco schema print…

57.title: Ticket schema
57.heading: id
57.snippet: string Unique ticket identifier. Defaults to the filename (without .md) when omitted.

58.title: Ticket schema
58.heading: repo
58.snippet: string Absolute path to the target git repo; presence makes this a PR-flow ticket, absence a Q&A ticket.

59.title: Ticket schema
59.heading: priority
59.snippet: low | normal | high Scheduling priority. Defaults to normal.

60.title: Ticket schema
60.heading: timeout_minutes
60.snippet: number Maximum execution time in minutes. Defaults to the daemon's configured default_timeout_minutes. Must be strict…

61.title: Ticket schema
61.heading: base_branch
61.snippet: string Base branch for the pull request. Defaults to the daemon's configured default_base_branch. Constrained to the …

62.title: Ticket schema
62.heading: branch_name
62.snippet: string Explicit name for the feature branch. Defaults to a generated slug from the ticket id. Constrained to the git-…

63.title: Ticket schema
63.heading: pr_title
63.snippet: string Pull request title. Defaults to the first H1 heading in the ticket body, or the ticket id.

64.title: Ticket schema
64.heading: draft
64.snippet: boolean Open the pull request as a draft. Defaults to the daemon's configured draft_by_default.

65.title: Ticket schema
65.heading: labels
65.snippet: array Labels to apply to the pull request. Merged with the daemon's configured default_labels.

66.title: Ticket schema
66.heading: reviewers
66.snippet: array GitHub handles to request as pull request reviewers.

67.title: Ticket schema
67.heading: amends_pr
67.snippet: number Pull request number to amend (push additional commits to) instead of opening a new PR.

68.title: Ticket schema
68.heading: push_remote
68.snippet: string Git remote the PR flow pushes the feature branch to. Defaults to origin. Set to fork (with a fork remote confi…

69.title: Ticket schema
69.heading: not_before
69.snippet: string Do not claim this ticket before this UTC instant (ISO 8601). The worker sets this for retry backoff; dispatche…

70.title: Ticket schema
70.heading: retry_count
70.snippet: integer Worker-managed: how many transparent requeue attempts this ticket has consumed. Do not set by hand.

71.title: Ticket schema
71.heading: tools
71.snippet: array Tool allowlist override for this ticket's agent session. Q&A tickets default to a read-only subset (read, grep,…

72.title: Ticket schema
72.heading: workdir
72.snippet: string Q&A tickets only: directory the session runs in (read-only tools). Defaults to the worker's processing directory.
